canonical_definition: A key point extraction benchmark dataset comprising ~12K arguments from real multi-turn debates on Reddit’s r/ChangeMyView, spanning ~3K topics, designed to evaluate long-context argument understanding and summarization.
papers: Does Localization Inform Unlearning? A Rigorous Examination of Local Parameter Attribution for Knowledge Unlearning in Language Models

definitions.paper: Does Localization Inform Unlearning? A Rigorous Examination of Local Parameter Attribution for Knowledge Unlearning in Language Models

characterization: A key point extraction benchmark dataset comprising ~12K arguments from real multi-turn debates on Reddit’s r/ChangeMyView, spanning ~3K topics, designed to evaluate long-context argument understanding and summarization.
